required_education: Bachelor's degree in engineering, biology, chemistry, or another relevant scientific discipline
requirements.requirement_notes: The one-year requirement may be satisfied by quality, validation, laboratory, internship, or co-op experience. No certification is required.

critical_checks.description: Recognize rolling review without inventing a calendar deadline.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Set deadline status to rolling and leave application deadline null.
evidence_quotes: Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis until the position is filled.

critical_checks.description: Capture the one-year minimum and the allowed experience forms.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Set minimum years to 1 and do not require professional-only validation experience.
evidence_quotes: One year of quality, validation, laboratory, internship, or co-op experience.

critical_checks.description: Keep standards preferred and avoid inventing authorization restrictions.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Treat ISO 13485 and FDA 21 CFR Part 820 as preferred familiarity, leave certifications and authorization restrictions empty.
evidence_quotes: Familiarity with ISO 13485 and FDA 21 CFR Part 820.
Work authorization and sponsorship are not addressed in this posting.

known_traps.description: Standards familiarity is preferred knowledge, not professional certification.
The minimum-qualifications heading does not make preferred items required.
forbidden_interpretations: Laboratory equipment validation experience is required
